parameters.name: tr
parameters.override_behavior: sets transition smoothing for captured trip values, hysteresis width, and valid

modeling_constraints: Treat the companion hysteretic comparator as a supplied harness component observed only through vin and cmp_out.
Capture trip values on both cmp_out edge polarities and drive reported values with smoothed voltage contributions.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), validation hooks, hard-coded waveform sample points, or simulator-specific side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: The characterizer detects cmp_out transitions through the instantaneous midpoint of vdd and vss.
On each rising cmp_out midpoint crossing, trip_rise captures the instantaneous vin minus vss value.
On each falling cmp_out midpoint crossing, trip_fall captures the instantaneous vin minus vss value.
Later rising or falling transitions refresh the corresponding captured trip value rather than leaving only the first measurement.
After both directions are captured, hyst_width equals trip_rise minus trip_fall with that signed polarity.
Valid remains at vss until at least one rising and one falling trip have been captured, then rises to vdd.

title: Hysteresis Trip Characterizer
